## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the proposed change. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? Which stakeholders benefit? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- Describe the change in detail. Include new fields, updated definitions, or revised normative language where possible. -->

## Affected files

<!-- List spec files, schema files, or registry files this would touch. -->

## Backward compatibility

<!-- Would existing v1.x TEPs remain valid? If not, explain the migration path. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## References

<!-- Industry standards, prior art, related issues, etc. -->
